_meta.notes: Essay-on-self-calibration genre — this is the meta page where the author reflects on their own track record. Mix of meta-claims (about own calibration) and concrete predictions. Self-rated convictions in the final section should be extracted with exact conviction values.

claims.claim_text: I am calibrated well on early-stage PMF calls (gut hits ~70% of cohorts)
I am over-confident on geography (wrong ~60% of the time)
I am poorly calibrated on macro-timing predictions (0/3 on AI peak)
I am well-calibrated on competitive moat questions

claims.rationale: Explicit self-tagged conviction with de-rating note

claims.claim_text: Next big platform shift comes from agent-orchestration primitives not model providers
At least one major SaaS public market exit happens by mid-2027
